name: the geometric lichen tea
identity: A specific, strangely geometric lichen growing on rocks near the largest disruption field. When brewed into a tea, it enhances focus and clarity of thought, though its long-term effects remain unknown. Lyrawyn warns that the tea possesses a 'hunger' and whispers of things that seek to consume all other patterns, suggesting it should not be used yet.
current_status: The Healer has decided to watch the lichen tea but not touch it, pending a full understanding of its demands. It remains in its natural location near the disruption field.

location.value: rocks near the largest disruption field

properties.value: brewed into tea enhances focus and clarity of thought

risk_profile.value: long-term effects unknown; possesses a 'hunger' that seeks to consume all other patterns; should not be touched yet

volatile_state.location: rocks near the largest disruption field

notes: The Healer has explicitly decided to observe this item without touching it until its full demands are understood.
